ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the code repository */,
  "lead_developer" TEXT /* Lead developer responsible for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last updated */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the development branch */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Current build status (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the module belongs to */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the module was last updated */,
  "module_type" TEXT /* Type of the module (e.g., service, utility, model) */,
  "module_path" TEXT /* File path of the module within the project */,
  "complexity_score" INTEGER /* Complexity score of the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric type (e.g., count, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric value */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., static analysis, unit tests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project or configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user has access to */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access was last updated */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date for user access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module that depends on another module */,
  "dependent_module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dependency was last updated */,
  "dependency_weight" INTEGER /* Importance or weight of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_dependencies_dependent_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_dependencies_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the module */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  "build_number" TEXT /* Build number associated with the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_version_history_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric history record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the history belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module version the metric history belongs to */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric at the time of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metric history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the metric history was last updated */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash linking the metric history to a specific commit in the code repository */,
  "build_id" TEXT /* Build ID linking the metric history to a specific build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES module_version_history ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type the threshold belongs to */,
  "threshold_value" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the threshold was last updated */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that violated the threshold */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold that was violated */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the violation was detected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the violation was last updated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the violation has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the violation was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_violations_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES metric_thresholds ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_violations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)
